primary_diagnosis: BOPET film thickness deviation (CD profile) caused by TDO zone-3 heater degradation producing non-uniform transverse stretching

causal_chain.event: TDO zone-3 temperature drops 8°C below setpoint while zones 1-2 and 4-5 remain stable
causal_chain.observed_behavior: Step decline from 215°C to 207°C starting at row 3400
causal_chain.physical_mechanism: Heater element degradation reduces radiative heat transfer to stretching film

causal_chain.event: Film edges show thickness increase (+0.6 µm) while center thins (-0.4 µm), creating M-shaped CD profile
causal_chain.observed_behavior: Symmetric edge-thick / center-thin deviation from flat target
causal_chain.physical_mechanism: Non-uniform temperature across web width causes differential draw ratio in transverse direction

causal_chain.event: Thickness deviation onset lags TDO temperature shift by approximately 45 seconds (15 rows at 3s sampling)
causal_chain.physical_mechanism: Thermal mass of film and transport delay between TDO and thickness gauge

hypotheses.name: TDO zone-3 heater degradation
hypotheses.physical_mechanism: Aging heater element in TDO zone 3 reduces temperature below setpoint, causing non-uniform transverse stretching and M-shaped CD thickness profile

supporting_evidence.detail: TDO_zone3_temp mean dropped 8°C with stable variance — consistent with heater output loss
M-shaped CD profile correlates temporally with zone-3 temperature drop

testable_predictions: Replacing zone-3 heater element should restore uniform CD profile within 30 minutes of stabilization
IR thermography of zone-3 should show cold spot on the affected heater bank

hypotheses.name: Raw material (resin) melt index variation
hypotheses.physical_mechanism: Batch-to-batch melt flow index variation changes extrusion die swell behavior

supporting_evidence.detail: Melt index variation is a known cause of thickness non-uniformity in BOPET processes

contradicting_evidence.detail: Thickness deviation correlates with TDO zone-3 temperature, not with extruder parameters

testable_predictions: If resin batch changed, extruder pressure and melt temperature should also shift — they did not

temporal_analysis.response_lag: 45 seconds (15 rows) after TDO zone-3 temperature shift
temporal_analysis.degradation_rate: Gradual over first 10 minutes, then stable at deviated level

ruled_out: Line speed variation — speed signal was constant within 0.1% throughout anomaly window
Extruder pressure fluctuation — pressure stable, no correlation with thickness deviation
